title: ArchIToken Module Spec
description: Module Registry identity & routing contract. Source of truth: 04-backend/harness-core/src/module_registry.rs and 03-frontend/lib/module-registry.ts. Every registered module must satisfy this schema (enforced by 03-frontend/lib/module-registry.test.ts and scripts/check-schemas.sh). Business routing uses module_id, never a BusinessPhase/9-phase enum (issue #2).

id.description: Canonical module_id (Module Registry key): lowercase snake_case.

routeHref.description: Frontend route derived from the canonical module_id.

schemaRef.description: Versioned module-schema reference for this module.
